title: `ancestor` filter does not match substrings
body:
### Issue Description

Podman's response to `podman ps -a -f ancestor=bee55555` is incompatible with that of Docker. Only full 64-character image digest yield a result, whereas with Docker even just the first letter returns matching containers.

It seems that this behavior may have been introduced with #10066

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Run this shell script
```
pushd $(mktemp -d)
docker ps -a -f ancestor=$(docker inspect $(docker run --cidfile docker-cid alpine; cat docker-cid) | jq ".[0].Image[7:]" -r)
docker ps -a -f ancestor=$(docker inspect $(cat docker-cid) | jq ".[0].Image[7:16]" -r); rm docker-cid
podman ps -a -f ancestor=$(podman inspect $(podman run --cidfile podman-cid alpine; cat podman-cid) | jq ".[0].Image" -r)
podman ps -a -f ancestor=$(podman inspect $(cat podman-cid) | jq ".[0].Image[:16]" -r); rm podman-cid
popd
```
2. Notice that both docker commands yield a list with at least one item, while for podman there's only an item in the table for the first invocation.

### Describe the results you received

```
CONTAINER ID   IMAGE     COMMAND          CREATED          STATUS                              PORTS     NAMES
785852e3cb24   alpine    "/bin/sh"        1 second ago     Exited (0) Less than a second ago             festive_lumiere
CONTAINER ID   IMAGE     COMMAND          CREATED          STATUS                              PORTS     NAMES
785852e3cb24   alpine    "/bin/sh"        1 second ago     Exited (0) Less than a second ago             festive_lumiere
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                            COMMAND     CREATED                 STATUS                                        PORTS       NAMES
4846e3c915aa  docker.io/library/alpine:latest  /bin/sh     Less than a second ago  Exited (0) Less than a second ago (starting)              recursing_thompson
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE       COMMAND     CREATED     STATUS      PORTS       NAMES
```

### Describe the results you expected

```
CONTAINER ID   IMAGE     COMMAND          CREATED          STATUS                              PORTS     NAMES
785852e3cb24   alpine    "/bin/sh"        1 second ago     Exited (0) Less than a second ago             festive_lumiere
CONTAINER ID   IMAGE     COMMAND          CREATED          STATUS                              PORTS     NAMES
785852e3cb24   alpine    "/bin/sh"        1 second ago     Exited (0) Less than a second ago             festive_lumiere
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                            COMMAND     CREATED                 STATUS                                        PORTS       NAMES
4846e3c915aa  docker.io/library/alpine:latest  /bin/sh     Less than a second ago  Exited (0) Less than a second ago (starting)              recursing_thompson
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                            COMMAND     CREATED                 STATUS                                        PORTS       NAMES
4846e3c915aa  docker.io/library/alpine:latest  /bin/sh     Less than a second ago  Exited (0) Less than a second ago (starting)              recursing_thompson
```
